title: chrysoglossum ornatum
intro: Chrysoglossum ornatum, also known as the golden-tongued orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysoglossum ornatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. Chrysoglossum ornatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, powder, and capsules, making it accessible for different therapeutic applications.
